title: rubus stipulosus
intro: Rubus stipulosus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Indian raspberry, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family and is native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus stipulosus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and help in treating various skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
